messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-609 — Resident Spy live screen: compact +/- font-size control in the header, and a slightly larger default pane text size
Approval context: Four calls the intake left to the specifier. Only the last genuinely needs your ruling; the first three are stated so you can veto them cheaply.
(a) DEFAULT SIZE. Recommendation: 11px -> 13px. Modest, matching "a tad bigger". Say a number if you want a different one.
(b) SCOPE OF THE CONTROL. Recom…
BL-609 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-609" (or "reject BL-609 <reason>") to act.
